ai_diagnosis.summary: Your product has a strong early CVR of 19.15%, but only 47 sessions and 0 ad spend, so the main issue is traffic acquisition, not conversion. Competitors are winning either through deep organic/recommendation traffic or heavy PPC coverage, while your ASIN currently has no visible ranking moat.
keyword_opportunities: jock itch cream / jock itch treatment
athlete's foot cream / athlete's foot treatment
miconazole nitrate 2% antifungal cream or clotrimazole 1% cream if formulation supports the claim
itch relief cream for burning, cracking, scaling skin
ad_strategy: Launch Sponsored Products with separate auto, broad, phrase, and exact campaigns to quickly build keyword data from the current high CVR base.
Create exact-match campaigns for core terms like jock itch cream, athlete's foot cream, ringworm treatment, antifungal cream, and anti itch cream.
Run product targeting against B0C7VP8SFV and B0CTX77NHH, which are ad-heavy competitors, and test lower-bid placements on Globe ASINs with strong organic traffic.
If brand eligible, add Sponsored Brands Video because CHARMPOO is already using video and brand ads to capture premium placements.
organic_growth: Rewrite title, bullets, A+ content, and backend search terms around the main symptom and condition keywords, while keeping all medical claims compliant.
Improve image stack with clear use cases: jock itch, athlete's foot, ringworm, itch relief, fast absorption, size/value, and application method.
Use coupon or limited launch discount to improve CTR and conversion while PPC builds sales velocity.
Start review generation through Vine or Request a Review; competitors with stronger organic/recommend traffic will be difficult to beat without review depth.
alerts: B0C7VP8SFV is aggressively buying traffic with 378 ad keywords and 55 ad campaigns, which may raise CPCs on core category terms.
B0CTX77NHH has a diversified ad mix with SP, video, and brand ads, so it may dominate top-of-search and video placements.
Globe ASINs have strong organic and recommendation traffic with very low ad dependency, indicating a mature ranking moat.
Your ASIN has rank null and only 47 sessions, so the 19.15% CVR is promising but not yet statistically stable.
Check compliance carefully: antifungal, miconazole, clotrimazole, and treatment claims should only be used if the active ingredient and Amazon/OTC requirements support them.
